headline: CDW Q1 Earnings Meet, Revenues Rise Y/Y on Infrastructure & AI Adoption
summary: CDW posts solid Q1 2026 with rising sales and steady EPS, as strong demand across segments and AI investments shape its 2026 outlook.

headline: Flex Q4 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Rise Y/Y, Stock Up
summary: FLEX Q4 FY26 EPS beat as revenue jumped 17% to $7.5B; Cloud & Power leads as the company plans a segment spinoff.

headline: ONTO Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Up Y/Y on Strong Semiconductor Demand
summary: Onto Innovation beats on Q1 EPS as AI chip demand lifts revenue, while new systems and a Rigaku stake signal a deeper push into advanced semiconductor tech.
